response_text:
ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar
ENTITY AirportArrival
PK airport_arrival
ATTR airport_arrival : varchar : PK
ATTR arrival_location : varchar : FK
ATTR arrival_name : varchar
ENTITY AirportDeparture
PK airport_departure
ATTR airport_departure : varchar : PK
ATTR departure_location : varchar : FK
ATTR departure_name : varchar
ENTITY ArrivalLocation
PK arrival_location
ATTR arrival_location : varchar : PK
ATTR arrival_city : varchar
ENTITY Belt
PK belt_number
ATTR belt_number : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_arrival : varchar : FK
ENTITY CrewLicense
PK crew_license
ATTR crew_license : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_role : varchar
ENTITY DepartureLocation
PK departure_location
ATTR departure_location : varchar : PK
ATTR departure_city : varchar
ENTITY License
PK license_number
ATTR license_number : varchar : PK
ATTR airplane_model : varchar
ENTITY Passport
PK passport
ATTR passport : varchar : PK
ATTR customer_name : varchar
ATTR customer_surname : varchar
ENTITY Status
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status : varchar
ENTITY Record
PK status_date, passport
ATTR flight_number : varchar
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR seat_number : varchar
ATTR status_date : date : PK
ATTR status_hour : time
ATTR airline_code : varchar : FK
ATTR airport_departure : varchar : FK
ATTR belt_number : varchar : FK
ATTR crew_license : varchar : FK
ATTR license_number : varchar : FK
ATTR passport : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR status_code : varchar : FK
REL Record -> Airline : 0..N -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Record -> AirportDeparture : 0..N -> 1 : FK=airport_departure
REL Record -> Belt : 0..N -> 1 : FK=belt_number
REL Record -> CrewLicense : 0..N -> 1 : FK=crew_license
REL Record -> License : 0..N -> 1 : FK=license_number
REL Record -> Passport : 0..N -> 1 : FK=passport
REL Record -> Status : 0..N -> 1 : FK=status_code
REL AirportArrival -> ArrivalLocation : 0..N -> 1 : FK=arrival_location
REL AirportDeparture -> DepartureLocation : 0..N -> 1 : FK=departure_location
REL Belt -> AirportArrival : 0..N -> 1 : FK=airport_arrival
